subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who is the founder of the city of Udaipur?
question_hi: उदयपुर के स्तरीन किस ने बनाया है?
B_hi: राजा उदयपुर स्तरीन के प्रमाणेश बेसों
explanation_en: Udaipur was founded by King Udai Singh II. The city was established in the year 1559 AD.

explanation_en: The founder of Jodhpur is Raja Uday Singh, also known as Rao Raja Uday Singh, who established the city in 1494 AD.
